// src/data/projects.js
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
// All project data in one place. Update this file to add/
// remove/edit your projects without touching any component.
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

export const PROJECTS = [
  {
    id: 1,
    icon: "🛒",
    name: "Food Delivery App",
    desc: "Full-featured MERN e-commerce app with JWT auth, Razore pay payment gateway.",
    tech: ["React", "Node.js", "Express", "MongoDB", "Razore pay", "Redux"],
    category: "fullstack",
    github: "https://github.com/venky4648",
    live: null,
    featured: true,
  },
  {
    id: 2,
    icon: "💬",
    name: "ChatFlow — Real-time Messenger",
    desc: "WebSocket-powered chat application with rooms, private DMs, typing indicators, and file sharing capabilities.",
    tech: ["React", "Socket.io", "Node.js", "MongoDB", "JWT"],
    category: "fullstack",
    github: "https://github.com/venky4648",
    live: null,
    featured: true,
  },
  {
    id: 3,
    icon: "📋",
    name: "TaskBoard — Project Manager",
    desc: "Kanban-style task management tool with drag & drop, team collaboration, deadlines, and progress analytics.",
    tech: ["React", "Node.js", "MongoDB", "Express", "Tailwind"],
    category: "fullstack",
    github: "https://github.com/venky4648",
    live: null,
    featured: false,
  },
  {
    id: 4,
    icon: "🔐",
    name: "AuthKit — Auth Boilerplate",
    desc: "Production-ready authentication system with JWT, refresh tokens, Google OAuth, email verification and role-based access.",
    tech: ["Node.js", "Express", "MongoDB", "JWT", "Passport.js"],
    category: "backend",
    github: "https://github.com/venky4648",
    live: null,
    featured: false,
  },
  {
    id: 5,
    icon: "🌐",
    name: "DevBlog — Blogging Platform",
    desc: "Markdown-based blogging platform with rich text editor, categories, SEO optimization, and comment system.",
    tech: ["React", "Node.js", "MongoDB", "Express", "Markdown"],
    category: "fullstack",
    github: "https://github.com/venky4648",
    live: null,
    featured: false,
  },
  {
    id: 6,
    icon: "📊",
    name: "FinTrack — Expense Tracker",
    desc: "Personal finance dashboard with transaction categorization, budget goals, charts, and monthly CSV export.",
    tech: ["React", "Chart.js", "Node.js", "MongoDB", "Express"],
    category: "frontend",
    github: "https://github.com/venky4648",
    live: null,
    featured: false,
  },
];
